en_title: Control Resonant Preorders Are Live – Here’s What Comes in Each Edition
cn_title: 《控制：共振》预购开启，各版本内容一览
subtitle: 新园长上工
opus_summary: 在6月的State of Play上，《控制：共振》公布了发售日并开启预购，将于9月24日登陆PS5、Xbox Series X和PC。实体版方面，PS5和Xbox Series X标准版售价59.99美元(约合人民币430元)，铁盒版69.99美元(约合人民币500元)。数字版同样有标准版和豪华版，豪华版售价69.99美元(约合人民币500元)，包含数字画册、资源包、服装、饰品和原声带，PS5豪华版还提供48小时抢先体验。预购任意版本均可获得额外奖励。本作是2019年《控制》的续作，主角为Dylan Faden，故事发生在被超自然力量扭曲的曼哈顿。IGN的Ryan McCaffrey在预览中表示，本作的近战战斗可能比前作更令人上瘾。

paragraphs.en: June's State of Play was packed with tons of exciting announcements, including news of Control Resonant's upcoming release date and the fact it's now available to preorder. What a treat for Remedy fans.
paragraphs.cn: 6月的State of Play上公布了大量激动人心的消息，其中包括《控制：共振》的发售日期以及预购现已开启。这对Remedy粉丝来说真是一份大礼。

paragraphs.en: For those interested in securing a copy of Control Resonant ahead of its September 24 release, there are a few options to choose from. In terms of physical copies, there's a standard physical edition for PS5 and Xbox Series X that's available to preorder for $59.99. There's also a steelbook edition for PS5 and Xbox Series X available for $69.99.
paragraphs.cn: 对于那些想在9月24日发售前入手《控制：共振》的玩家，有多种版本可供选择。实体版方面，PS5和Xbox Series X标准版售价59.99美元(约合人民币430元)，铁盒版售价69.99美元(约合人民币500元)。

paragraphs.en: Those interested in digital copies can choose between a digital deluxe edition , which is available to preorder for $69.99, and a standard copy for $59.99. Below, you can learn more about each of these versions and what they come with.
paragraphs.cn: 想要数字版的玩家可以选择数字豪华版（售价69.99美元，约合人民币500元）或标准版（售价59.99美元，约合人民币430元）。下面我们来详细了解各版本的具体内容。

paragraphs.en: At the moment, Best Buy has its preorder page up for physical copies of Control Resonant, with both PS5 and Xbox Series X versions listed for $59.99. As more retailers join them and drop their own preorder pages, we'll be sure to add them in here.
paragraphs.cn: 目前，Best Buy已上线《控制：共振》实体版的预购页面，PS5和Xbox Series X版本均标价59.99美元(约合人民币430元)。随着更多零售商加入并开放预购，我们会及时更新。

paragraphs.en: Similar to the above, Best Buy seems to be the only spot that has their preorder page up at the moment for the steelbook edition. Once other retailers have their pages up, we'll add them here as well.
paragraphs.cn: 与标准版类似，目前似乎只有Best Buy上线了铁盒版的预购页面。其他零售商上线后，我们也会在此补充。

paragraphs.en: This version of the game comes in quite a cool looking black and red steelbook case, with protagonist Dylan Faden at the center. It also comes with fine art prints and a key art poster alongside the game itself.
paragraphs.cn: 该版本采用酷炫的黑红配色铁盒，封面是主角Dylan Faden。除游戏本体外，还附带艺术印刷品和一张主视觉海报。

paragraphs.en: The digital deluxe edition of Control Resonant comes with quite a lot of extra goodies for fans. Alongside the main game, it also comes with a digital artbook, the Starter Resource Bundle, the AWE Mission Outfit, the Untapped Artifact (Wallet), and original soundtrack.
paragraphs.cn: 《控制：共振》数字豪华版为粉丝提供了大量额外内容。除游戏本体外，还包括数字画册、新手资源包、AWE任务服装、未开发神器（钱包）以及原声带。

paragraphs.en: Plus, according to the PlayStation Blog , "The PlayStation 5 Digital Deluxe Edition includes 48 hours of advance access."
paragraphs.cn: 此外，根据PlayStation Blog，「PS5数字豪华版包含48小时抢先体验权限。」

paragraphs.en: Of course, by ordering it early you'll also get the preorder bonuses detailed below.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，提前预购还可获得以下预购奖励。

paragraphs.en: If you opt for the standard digital edition of the game, this will set you up with the main game and the preorder bonus detailed below when you order early.
paragraphs.cn: 如果选择数字标准版，提前预购将获得游戏本体及以下预购奖励。

paragraphs.en: Those who digitally preorder Control Resonant will get to enjoy two bonuses for ordering the game early:
paragraphs.cn: 数字预购《控制：共振》的玩家将获得两项预购奖励：

paragraphs.en: Control Resonant is the sequel to 2019's Control , and the latest game from developer Remedy. As for where the story takes us this time, a PlayStation Blog post from Remedy Entertainment's Co-Creative Director Mikael Kasurinen explains, "In Control Resonant, Manhattan has been warped by paranatural forces: its architecture impossible, its realities shifting, its streets stalked by monstrous entities born from a new kind of resonance. You can see glimpses of this mysterious new threat in the trailer. Dylan is at the center of it all. He’s the sole playable character this time, and that choice sets the tone for the sequel."
paragraphs.cn: 《控制：共振》是2019年《控制》的续作，也是开发商Remedy的最新作品。关于本作的故事背景，Remedy Entertainment联合创意总监Mikael Kasurinen在PlayStation Blog上解释道：「在《控制：共振》中，曼哈顿被超自然力量扭曲：建筑变得不可能，现实不断变换，街道上游荡着由新型共振诞生的怪物实体。你可以在预告片中瞥见这种神秘的新威胁。Dylan是这一切的核心。这次他是唯一的可玩角色，这一选择奠定了续作的基调。」

paragraphs.en: IGN's Ryan McCaffrey got to take a swing at Remedy's latest recently as well, and said in his first-look preview that, "What I came away with surprised me: I adored the first Control, but early indications are that I might like Resonant even more. Why? It’s not just that it’s markedly different and not just a same-y sequel, but it’s that its melee combat might scratch my Ninja Gaiden-style itch."
paragraphs.cn: IGN的Ryan McCaffrey最近也体验了Remedy的这款新作，他在前瞻中表示：「结果让我很惊讶：我很喜欢初代《控制》，但初步迹象表明我可能更喜欢《共振》。为什么？不仅因为它明显不同，不是千篇一律的续作，还因为它的近战战斗可能满足我对《忍者龙剑传》风格的渴望。」

paragraphs.en: If that's caught your attention, you'll want to make sure you have your calendar marked for September 24 to start playing it right away.
paragraphs.cn: 如果这引起了你的兴趣，记得在日历上标记9月24日，第一时间开玩。

paragraphs.en: Hannah Hoolihan is a freelancer who writes with the guides and commerce teams here at IGN.
paragraphs.cn: Hannah Hoolihan是一名自由撰稿人，与IGN的指南和商务团队合作。
